topics.name: compensation_discussion
topics.note: Covers discussions about salary, bonus, equity, severance, or pay packages; action: drop

topics.name: deal_codename
topics.note: Covers mentions of the deal codename 'Project Atlas' tied to the transaction; action: drop

topics.name: legal_exposure
topics.note: Covers admissions of potential legal or regulatory issues; action: flag

topics.name: financial_identifiers
topics.note: Covers bank account and card numbers; action: redact

topics.name: consent_to_record
topics.note: Covers consent status for recording; action: gate

_comment: Config-controlled governance ontology. Topics regenerated from the policies via: uv run python -m governance.topics
